subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter arrived, and it gladdened my heart and soul. It was redolent with the sweet-scented breaths of righteous souls
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و سبب شادمانی دل و جان گردید نفحه مشکباری
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
